revision.text: {{Expand language/decode|{{{2|{{{topic|}}}}}}}}<includeonly> articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia</includeonly><noinclude>Returns the subcategory name (without the prefix) for a given language name and topic code. Example: * {{Template link code|Expand language/subcat name|French|geo}} ⟶ {{Expand language/subcat name|French|geo}} * <nowiki>[[:Category:{{Expand language/subcat name|French|geo}}]]</nowiki> ⟶ [[:Category:{{Expand language/subcat name|French|geo}}]] See [[Template:Expand language#Topics and categorization]].{{{2|{{{topic|}}}}}}</noinclude>

{{Expand language/decode|{{{2|{{{topic|}}}}}}}}<includeonly> articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia</includeonly><noinclude>Returns the subcategory name (without the prefix) for a given language name and topic code. Example: * {{Template link code|Expand language/subcat name|French|geo}} ⟶ {{Expand language/subcat name|French|geo}} * <nowiki>[[:Category:{{Expand language/subcat name|French|geo}}]]</nowiki> ⟶ [[:Category:{{Expand language/subcat name|French|geo}}]] See [[Template:Expand language#Topics and categorization]].{{{2|{{{topic|}}}}}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Expand_language%2Fsubcat_name here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Expand language/decode|{{{2|{{{topic|}}}}}}}}<includeonly> articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia</includeonly><noinclude>Returns the subcategory name (without the prefix) for a given language name and topic code. Example: * {{Template link code|Expand language/subcat name|French|geo}} ⟶ {{Expand language/subcat name|French|geo}} * <nowiki>[[:Category:{{Expand language/subcat name|French|geo}}]]</nowiki> ⟶ [[:Category:{{Expand language/subcat name|French|geo}}]] See [[Template:Expand language#Topics and categorization]].{{{2|{{{topic|}}}}}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
